name: Creamy Jigglers
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 oz) Jello gelatin dessert, any flavor
1 package (4 servings) Jello vanilla instant pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir boiling water into gelatin in a large bowl until completely dissolved.
2. Cool for at least 30 minutes at room temperature.
3. Pour milk into a medium bowl. Add pudding mix. Beat with a wire whisk for 1 minute.
4. Quickly pour the pudding mixture into the cooled gelatin. Stir with a wire whisk until well blended.
5. Pour into a 13 x 9 inch pan. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
6. Dip the bottom of the pan in warm water for about 15 seconds.
7. Cut into decorative shapes using cookie cutters, all the way through the gelatin, or cut into 1-inch squares.
8. Makes about 24 pieces.
